# rust-x11rb-protocol0.12

Compatibility package for the exact published `x11rb-protocol 0.12.0` release
locked by `x11-clipboard 0.8.1`. It initially exposes only the default, Unix,
and XFixes-related features required by the clipboard dependency chain. The
Clean Fedora 43 and Fedora 44 x86_64 mock builds passed, and the package is
enabled.
